result.stdout:
awsat (AWS Service Authentication Tool)

Source Code: https://github.com/karimz1/AWS-Service-Authentication-Tool 
Author: Karim Zouine - https://github.com/karimz1 


Available commands:
Ecr: Execute ECR authentication.
NuGet: Execute NuGet authentication.
None: Invalid or unsupported command.

  -c, --command          Required. Command to execute.

  -r, --region           Required. AWS region.

  -l, --logFolderPath    Required. Path to log folder.

  -d, --debugMode        Enhance Logging using DebugMode

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.
